summary: Linked the F-Zero car stage unit by converting src/melee/gr/grfzerocar.c from NonMatching to Matching in configure.py, adjusting symbol metadata for its rodata/data/sdata/sdata2 objects, and making source-level matching fixes in grfzerocar.c. The main tactics were replacing placeholder/broad includes with specific headers, using an explicit assert message string, preserving required sdata2 ordering with a fake function, changing casts and object access patterns, adding stack padding/local reordering, and inlining scale multiplication instead of relying on multiplyScale.
what_changed: Changed configure.py so melee/gr/grfzerocar.c is built as Object(Matching, ...) instead of Object(NonMatching, ...).

Updated config/GALE01/symbols.txt around grFZeroCar rodata, data, sdata, and sdata2 entries, including changing several grFZeroCar_* globals into local @ labels and adding local section labels such as ...rodata.0 and ...data.0.

Reduced or corrected includes in src/melee/gr/grfzerocar.c by removing placeholder.h, platform.h, gr/types.h, baselib/aobj.h, baselib/gobj.h, and baselib/object.h while retaining specific dependencies such as granime, grdatfiles, ground, lb_00F9, sc/types, dolphin/mtx, and baselib/jobj.
Added static char grFZeroCar_804D4598[8] = "archive" and changed HSD_ASSERT(95, archive) to HSD_ASSERTMSG(95, archive, grFZeroCar_804D4598).
Added a fakeFunc(Vec3) specifically documented as being for sdata2 ordering; it references 1.0 as f64 and 0.0f through Vec3 fields.
Changed DynamicModelDesc pointer construction from adding offset to a u8* pointer to adding offset to a uintptr_t cast of archive->unk4->unk8.
Changed root initialization from GET_JOBJ(gobj) to gobj->hsd_obj.
Reordered locals and added six u32 pad locals in grFZeroCar_801CAFBC, apparently to satisfy stack/codegen matching.
Replaced multiplyScale(tra_jobj, ground_scale) with an explicit scoped block that calls HSD_JObjGetScale, multiplies scl.x/y/z by ground_scale, and calls HSD_JObjSetScale.
smart_moves: Used the build configuration flip to make the linked status explicit and searchable: grfzerocar.c is now marked Matching in configure.py.
Localized symbol-map corrections to the affected grFZeroCar address ranges rather than broadly renaming unrelated stage symbols.
Introduced the "archive" string as a named static char and routed the assert through HSD_ASSERTMSG, matching the emitted string/reference behavior more closely than a plain HSD_ASSERT.

When helper-call codegen did not match, expanded multiplyScale manually into get-scale, component multiply, and set-scale operations, a common decomp tactic for recovering exact instruction sequences.
Used stack/local layout nudges, including explicit padding, to force a match in grFZeroCar_801CAFBC.
Documented the sdata2-ordering hack inline, making the non-obvious fake function easier for future reviewers and decompilers to understand.
decomp_lessons: For stage files, moving a unit to Matching often requires synchronized changes in source, configure.py, and config/GALE01/symbols.txt; all three were touched here.
Small-data and small-data2 ordering can be a blocker even when function logic is understood; constants may need source references in otherwise artificial code to land in the expected order.
Assert macros affect data/string ordering and emitted references. If a plain HSD_ASSERT does not match, check whether the original used an assert message string via HSD_ASSERTMSG.
Do not assume existing helper functions produce the same codegen as the original. Manual expansion of simple helpers like scale multiplication can be necessary.
Pointer arithmetic spelling matters for matching. Rewriting casts through uintptr_t versus u8* can change generated code while preserving semantics.
Macro convenience such as GET_JOBJ may not always match direct field access; direct gobj->hsd_obj access was used here.
Symbol scope can change as a file becomes linked: several grFZeroCar_* sdata/sdata2 names became local @ labels in symbols.txt.
naming_conventions: Stage unit uses the camel-cased prefix grFZeroCar_ for known symbols, e.g. grFZeroCar_803E0BD8, grFZeroCar_804D4598, and grFZeroCar_801CAFBC.
The file path and configure object use lowercase stage module naming: melee/gr/grfzerocar.c.
Unknown local compiler-generated constants/strings are represented as @NNN labels in symbols.txt, such as @401, @402, @405, @406, @407, and @408.
Local section boundary labels use ellipsis-style names in symbols.txt, such as ...rodata.0 and ...data.0.
The added helper was named fakeFunc and explicitly commented as a matching/order workaround rather than as real game logic.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Added a fake static function taking Vec3 and assigning 0.0f and a f64 1.0 to influence sdata2 constant ordering.
Changed HSD_ASSERT to HSD_ASSERTMSG with a static "archive" string to affect string/data emission.
Inserted explicit u32 pad locals and reordered variables to influence stack layout.
Used direct gobj->hsd_obj access instead of GET_JOBJ(gobj).
Replaced multiplyScale with explicit HSD_JObjGetScale/HSD_JObjSetScale operations on a local Vec3.
Used uintptr_t in pointer arithmetic for DynamicModelDesc address calculation.
Adjusted symbols.txt to reflect local labels and correct object sizes/order after linking.

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.comment: @PsiLupan @r-burns Do you know how to fix this string ordering? I tried a bunch of things with inlines and pragmas and can't get it to behave.
review_feedback.lesson: String/sdata ordering was an active review concern, and the final solution relied on source-level ordering hacks rather than a clearly documented preferred project-wide method.

review_feedback.author: jellejurre
review_feedback.comment: PR body says the author was unsure how to do sdata2 ordering properly and used a fake function based on an earlier message.
review_feedback.lesson: Evidence for the sdata2 fake-function method is explicit but tentative; future work should confirm whether a better accepted ordering technique exists.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that remove or replace fakeFunc(Vec3) sdata2-ordering hacks.
Search for other stage files using HSD_ASSERTMSG with a static "archive" string.
Search for multiplyScale replacements with explicit HSD_JObjGetScale/HSD_JObjSetScale blocks.
Check whether project conventions changed for sdata2 ordering after PR #2358.
Compare grfzerocar.c symbol-map treatment with other linked individual stage units.
